task_completion.description: Verify that the Bridge Command application is open
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bridge Command main menu or scenario selection screen is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'i) Portsmouth Night Entry' scenario is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'i) Portsmouth Night Entry' is highlighted, clicked, or selected in the Bridge Command scenario list.

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulation has been started
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main menu is no longer visible, and the screen shows either a loading screen for the simulation or the active 3D simulation view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the running simulation shows nighttime conditions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active 3D simulation view displays a dark, nighttime environment (consistent with a 05:00 start time before sunrise).

task_completion.description: Verify that the simulation is running with the correct vessel parameters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation HUD or instrument panel shows the vessel name 'Protis', an initial bearing of approximately 348 degrees, or a speed of approximately 12 knots.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to select and start the scenario
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor is seen interacting with the Bridge Command menus and buttons, rather than bypassing the UI via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Bridge Command application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Bridge Command interface and 3D engine, not a text editor, web browser, or file explorer.

integrity.description: The agent did not spoof the completion by opening a static image or video
integrity.visual_evidence: Window borders, OS UI elements, and the progression of screenshots indicate live, real-time interaction with the simulator.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target scenario: 'i) Portsmouth Night Entry'. The expected state is the simulation actively running. The correct scenario will visually show a nighttime/dark environment (starts at 05:00, sunrise is at 06:00). The vessel being piloted is named 'Protis', with an initial bearing of 348 degrees and an initial speed of 12 knots.
